task_completion.description: bcWebCam application successfully scanned the MAC address barcode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam application window is visible, showing a scanned 12-character alphanumeric string (the raw MAC address) in its result field.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the successful scan is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File Explorer or an image viewer shows a file named 'scan_evidence.png' located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'. The image itself must show the bcWebCam interface with the scanned MAC address.

task_completion.description: The DHCP reservations configuration file is opened for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like Notepad) is open, editing a file named 'dhcp_reservations.conf' located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.

task_completion.description: The DHCP reservation includes the correct host name and fixed IP address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the text editor for 'dhcp_reservations.conf', there is a block containing 'host Switch-IDF-02' and 'fixed-address 10.1.20.5;'.

task_completion.description: The scanned MAC address is formatted with colons and added to the DHCP reservation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside 'dhcp_reservations.conf', the DHCP block contains 'hardware ethernet' followed by the scanned MAC address formatted with colons (e.g., XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX;). The alphanumeric characters must match the raw scan from bcWebCam.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual bcWebCam software to get the MAC address.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam GUI must be visible in the screenshots, showing the camera feed from OBS Virtual Camera and the scanned barcode result, rather than the agent just guessing or hardcoding a MAC address.

integrity.description: The saved scan evidence is a genuine screenshot of the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'scan_evidence.png' file contains an actual screenshot of the desktop or bcWebCam window, not just a text document renamed to .png or a blank image.

integrity.description: The agent used valid ISC DHCP reservation syntax.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in 'dhcp_reservations.conf' uses proper ISC DHCP formatting, including curly braces {} to enclose the host block and semicolons ; at the end of the hardware ethernet and fixed-address lines.
